workplan: Build Agent 5: Booking Creation. Generate booking_id, save to Firestore, produce bilingual (English + Urdu) confirmation message with ETA.
tasks_completed: Created booking_agent with scheduling logic based on urgency
create_booking_record() saves to Firestore via firebase_client.create_booking()
LLM generates bilingual confirmation_message + urdu_message + booking_instructions
decisions_made: Booking ID generation in Python (not LLM) for consistency
Urgency→ETA mapping: URGENT=2-4hr, NORMAL=same/next day, FLEXIBLE=2-3 days
Bilingual output (English + Urdu) for Pakistani market accessibility
Firestore document ID = booking_id for easy lookup
outcome: Booking ID BK2026051710151566D0 created and saved to Firestore successfully. Confirmation message generated in English.
